esqlQuery.esql:
FROM logs-azure.activity.otel-*
// Restrict to Azure Activity Logs (Security category)
| WHERE azure.category IS NOT NULL
| WHERE azure.category == "Security"
// Derive caller for grouping (falls back to principal ID for service principals / managed identities)
| EVAL caller = COALESCE(user.id, azure.identity.authorization.evidence.principal.id, "unknown")
| STATS event_count = COUNT(*) BY caller, azure.operation.name
| SORT event_count DESC
| LIMIT 20
